prompt:
Scene:
A black-and-white scanning electron microscope micrograph, as if captured in a university imaging lab. The field of view shows a single pollen grain on a dark conductive stub surface, surrounded by a few tiny dust particles for scale. The mood is clinical, quiet, and scientific.

Subject:
One spherical pollen grain centered slightly above the frame midpoint, filling about 70% of the image width. Its surface is covered with dense spike-like ridges and cratered pores that resemble a miniature city seen from orbit, but it must still read as a real biological specimen under SEM.

Important details:
Authentic SEM visual medium: monochrome grayscale, high depth of field, crisp electron-microscope edge contrast, subtle charging highlights on raised ridges, fine granular noise, shadowed valleys between spikes, no photographic color. Camera viewpoint is a near top-down macro angle with slight tilt, 1:1 square composition. Add a small unobtrusive lower-left scale bar shape only, without readable letters or numbers.

Use case:
Gallery card for a GPT Image 2 capability atlas, showcasing scientific realism and micro-scale texture. The image should be crop-safe as a square thumbnail and remain legible at small sizes.

Constraints:
No readable text, no watermark, no logos, no insects, no human-made buildings, no fantasy glowing effects, no colorization, no extra main specimens, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio.
title: Pollen Micro City
description: A grayscale SEM-style image of a pollen grain whose real microstructure suggests a miniature city without becoming an illustration.

en.title: Pollen Micro City
en.description: A grayscale SEM-style image of a pollen grain whose real microstructure suggests a miniature city without becoming an illustration.

zh-CN.title: 花粉微型城市
zh-CN.description: 一张灰阶 SEM 风格图像，花粉粒的真实微观结构暗示微型城市，但不变成插画。

alt.en: A grayscale SEM-style pollen grain with spikes and pores on a dark microscope stub.
alt.zh-CN: 一颗带尖刺和孔洞结构的灰阶扫描电镜风格花粉粒，位于深色样品台上。
